name: sinkr
documentation:
Python SDK for `Sinkr`.

Usage:

```py

from sinkr import SinkrSource


my_source = SinkrSource()
my_source.send_to_channel("my-channel", "my-event", {
    "my-data": 123
})
```

methods.name: sinkr.sink.SinkrSink.__init__
documentation:
Create a new sink to receive messages from Sinkr.

Parameters fall back to environment variables if not provided.

Can be used as an async context manager to handle the connection.

```
param url

The Sinkr URL to connect to.

param app_id

The Sinkr app ID to connect to.
```

methods.name: sinkr.sink.SinkrSink.on
documentation:
Subscribe to an event.

```
param event

The event to subscribe to. Use None to subscribe to all events.

param callback

The callback to call when the event is received.

return

A function to unsubscribe from the event.
```

methods.name: sinkr.sink.SinkrSink.once
documentation:
Subscribe to an event once.

```
param event

The event to subscribe to. Use None to subscribe to any event.

param callback

The callback to call when the event is received.

return

A function to unsubscribe from the event. Does nothing if the event has already been received.
```

methods.name: sinkr.sink.SinkrSink.clear_listeners
documentation:
Clear all listeners for an event. If no event is provided, clear all listeners.

```
param event

The event to clear listeners for. Use None to clear all listeners.
```

functions.name: sinkr.source.stream_with_prelude
documentation:
Attach a prelude object to an iterable stream.

```
param prelude

The prelude object to attach.

param iterable

The iterable stream to attach the prelude to.

return

A new stream with the prelude attached.
```

functions.name: sinkr.source.data_is_stream
documentation:
Determine if the data type is a stream.

```
param data

The data to check.

return

True if the data is a stream, False otherwise.
```

methods.name: sinkr.source.SinkrSource.__init__
documentation:
Create a new source to send messages to Sinkr.

Parameters fall back to environment variables if not provided.

```
param url

The Sinkr URL to connect to.

param app_key

The Sinkr app key to authenticate with.

param app_id

The Sinkr app ID to connect to.

raises ValueError

If the URL or app key is missing.

return

A new Sinkr source.
```

methods.name: sinkr.source.SinkrSource.authenticate_user
documentation:
Authenticate a user with Sinkr.

```
param peer_id

The peer ID of the user's connection.

param user_id

The ID of the user.

param user_info

The user's information.

return

The HTTP status code from Sinkr.
```

methods.name: sinkr.source.SinkrSource.subscribe_to_channel
documentation:
Subscribe a user to a channel. If the channel is a private or presence channel, the user must be authenticated.

```
param user_id

The ID of the user to subscribe. This can be a connection's peer ID or, if authenticated, the user's ID.

param channel

The channel to subscribe to.

return

The HTTP status code from Sinkr.
```

methods.name: sinkr.source.SinkrSource.unsubscribe_from_channel
documentation:
Unsubscribe a user from a channel.

```
param user_id

The ID of the user to unsubscribe. This can be a connection's peer ID or, if authenticated, the user's ID.

param channel

The channel to unsubscribe from.

return

The HTTP status code from Sinkr.
```

methods.name: sinkr.source.SinkrSource.send_message_to_channel
documentation:
Send a message to a channel.

```
param channel

The channel to send the message to.

param event

The event to send.

param message

The message to send. If this is a stream, messages will be sent for each chunk of the stream.

return

The HTTP status code from Sinkr.
```

methods.name: sinkr.source.SinkrSource.send_message_to_user
documentation:
Send a message to a user.

```
param user_id

The ID of the user to send the message to.

param event

The event to send.

param message

The message to send. If this is a stream, messages will be sent for each chunk of the stream.

return

The HTTP status code from Sinkr.
```

methods.name: sinkr.source.SinkrSource.broadcast_message
documentation:
Broadcast a message to all users.

```
param event

The event to send.

param message

The message to send. If this is a stream, messages will be sent for each chunk of the stream.

return

The HTTP status code from Sinkr.
```
